title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, an always-on cloud platform enabling AI agents to build, deploy, host, and run software in a real Ubuntu environment. It integrates code generation with practical deployment infrastructure including databases, storage, GitHub, AWS, and HTTPS hosting, allowing agents to move beyond code generation to full application delivery.
